## Purpose 
Remove closures over global variables in `coupler_driver.jl` to improve performance.

This includes changes for:
- comms_ctx
- mono_surface
- turbulent_fluxes
- thermo_params
title: remove closures in driver

body: Ensures that only one init job is run at the same time across pipelines.
title: Add concurrent group for init
